notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Trevor Story. Miguel Andujar out at 2nd, first baseman Willson Contreras to second baseman Marcelo Mayer.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Trevor Story. Miguel Andujar out at 2nd, first baseman Willson Contreras to second baseman Marcelo Mayer.

notableEvents.label: Jackson Merrill GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Merrill grounds into a double play, pitcher Ranger Suarez to shortstop Trevor Story to first baseman Willson Contreras. Fernando Tatis Jr. out at 2nd. Jackson Merrill out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Trevor Story. Miguel Andujar out at 2nd, first baseman Willson Contreras to second baseman Marcelo Mayer.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by catcher Carlos Narváez on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Jake Cronenworth GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Cronenworth grounds into a double play, first baseman Willson Contreras to shortstop Trevor Story. Xander Bogaerts out at 2nd. Jake Cronenworth out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
